title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 59.450 - Index to marriage contracts and certificates
text:
59.450.  Index to marriage contracts and certificates. — The recorder shall, in like manner, make, keep and preserve a similar index to all the books of record in his office wherein marriage contracts and certificates of marriages are recorded.
(RSMo 1939 § 13169) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11550; 1919 § 10575; 1909 § 10388
